title: Drug products legislation and guidelines - Canada.ca
content:
## Drug products legislation and guidelines

## Acts and Regulations
The Pharmaceutical Drugs Directorate ( PDD ) applies the Food and Drug Regulations under the authority of the Food and Drugs Act to ensure that the pharmaceutical drugs offered for sale in Canada are safe, effective and of high quality. The PDD also administers fee regulations for drugs under the authority of the Financial Administration Act. All Federal Acts and associated Regulations are available on the Justice Canada Web site.
- Notices and Early Consultation
